description_long: This object is a modern school complex consisting of several rectangular buildings with flat and gabled roofs, surrounded by green lawns and paved areas. The main building features a large, flat-roofed structure with multiple windows and an adjacent open courtyard, which includes parking spaces and landscaped greenery. A separate, smaller building with a pitched roof sits across a paved area, likely serving as an administrative or auxiliary facility. The grounds include a fenced sports court, trees, and a few scattered outbuildings, suggesting dedicated spaces for recreation and storage. A flagpole is visible near the main entrance, and the overall layout is open, with clear pathways and driveways connecting the different sections. The materials appear to be primarily concrete, glass, and metal, with some green roofing and asphalt surfaces.
description: A modern school complex with multiple buildings, green lawns, paved areas, and a fenced sports court. The layout includes a main flat-roofed building, a pitched-roof auxiliary building, and landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main school building with its flat roof, adjacent courtyard, and the fenced sports court on the right. The auxiliary building and flagpole are visible in the background.
description_view_1: From this angle, the parking area and courtyard are prominent, with the auxiliary pitched-roof building and outbuildings clearly separated from the main structure.
description_view_2: This view shows the front of the school complex, with the main entrance, flagpole, and both the main and auxiliary buildings visible, as well as the sports court and green spaces.
description_view_3: The layout of the entire school grounds is visible, including the main building, auxiliary building, sports court, and scattered outbuildings, with clear separation between each section.
